name: Volusion
description: Volusion is an all-in-one e-commerce platform that provides merchants with a REST API for managing online store products, categories, customers, orders, shipping, and inventory across Volusion-hosted stores.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Volusion API
hasOfferCatalog.description: The Volusion API allows merchants on Business and Prime plans to connect third-party applications with their Volusion store, enabling import and export of products, orders, customers, categories, shipping, and inventory data.

offers.name: Volusion Plans
offers.description: API access is available on Business and Prime plans.
